title: Sass & Belle Bee Bamboo Spoons - Set of 3
features: Add a spoonful of nature to mealtime with our joyful set of three baby spoons.
description: Add a spoonful of nature to mealtime with our joyful set of three baby spoons. Made from 100% planet-friendly bamboo, you'll find our buzzing bee design. A wonderful way to wave goodbye to single-use plastic and have fun at the same time. This item has been hand-polished and crafted from natural bamboo which may cause subtle variations in the colour and engraving, making each one beautifully unique.
